history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at row07 column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row06 column D) is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The cell to the left (west) is a wall. The only safe adjacent cell is to the right (east) at row07 column E, which is floor. Turning right will make the agent face east, allowing a forward move to that safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located to the northwest at (05,B). I am at (07,D) facing north. The cell directly in front (06,D) is floor, so it is safe to move forward. Turning left would face me into lava at (07,C), and turning right would face a wall at (07,E). Therefore, moving forward is the best action to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7, D) facing north. The goal is at (6, B), which is two steps west and one step north. The cell directly north (6, D) is empty but leads to a dead end because the next cell west is lava. A safe path is to go west first: from (7, D) to (7, C) (empty) and then to (7, B) (empty), then north to (6, B) goal. So I need to turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located at row 05 column E, two steps north and one step east from my current position at (07, D). The cell directly ahead (06, D) is a safe floor, so I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north at (7,D). The goal is at (6,E), one cell north and one cell east. The cell directly ahead (6,D) is safe floor. I will move forward to that cell, then I can turn right and move to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,D) facing north. The goal is immediately to the east at (7,E). The forward cell is a wall, so I need to turn right to face east, then move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

: MOVE_FORWARD<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 6 column D. I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
